biography: Brandon Tyler Sklenar (born June 26, 1990) is an American actor best known for his roles in the films Mapplethorpe, Vice (both 2018), Midway (2019), and It Ends with Us (2024). He is also known for his role as Spencer Dutton in the Paramount+ Western series 1923 (2022–2023).
name: Brandon Sklenar
